_meta.description: Canary queries for retrieval regression testing. 5 queries per mode, each with expected paper_ids that must appear in top-k results.
_meta.instructions: Curate by running queries in the web UI, noting which papers appear, and adding their paper_ids here. Use `python -m src.query --search 'your query'` to find paper_ids.
